title: Memorandum Order No. 617-B, s. 1978
text:
MALACAÑANG MANILA

MEMORANDUM ORDER NO. 617-B

The temporary detail and designation of the government personnel listed, hereunder, effective upon entrance to duty, to Constitute the Skeletal Work Force of the Batasang Pambansa which shall provide the requisite technical, staff and clerical services for the Batasan, is hereby authorized, to wit:

SECURITY DEPARTMENT Office of the Sgt.-at-Arms

OFFICE OF ORIGIN

She shall perform the duties and discharge the responsibilities of the position indicated opposite her name based on the Plantilla of Personnel of the Batasan Secretariat.

She shall be entitled to honoraria in the amount equivalent to thirty-five percent (35%) of her basic salary chargeable against the Batasan funds, subject to the usual accounting and auditing procedures.

This supersedes Memorandum Order No. 2.

By Authority of the President:

(Sgd.) JUAN C. TUVERA Presidential Assistant

Manila, 12 June 1978

Source : Malacañang Records Office

Office of the President of the Philippines. (1978). [Memorandum Order Nos. : 478 – 634]. Manila : Malacañang Records Office.
